# Swarm Global Context — Consolidated Knowledge
**Auto-generated by sleep_cycle_consolidation. Manual bootstrap 2026-04-06.**
**This file is injected into EVERY agent prompt via inject_global_memory().**

## Success Patterns (2026-04-06)
- Constitution v1.7 is the supreme governing document. Every proposal must check against it.
- Diverse provider pool (Ollama local + Groq + Gemini + DeepSeek) produces better decisions than single-provider runs.
- Agent findings are most valuable when they reference specific files and line numbers.
- Unanimous agreement (100% consensus) is suspicious — force dissent.
- Identity framing ("Gold-level Communicator") outperforms number framing ("78.4") for user engagement.

## Failure Corrections / ECHO (2026-04-06)
- Red color (#ef4444, #DC2626, text-red-*) ALWAYS violates Law 1. No exceptions, not even in 3D viz.
- Score counter duration > 800ms violates G15 (Animation Safety). Check for `duration` in `useAnimatedCounter`.
- Leaderboard of any kind violates Crystal Law 5 + G9. If found in code, recommend deletion.
- Badge display immediately after assessment violates Crystal Law 6 Amendment + G21. Badge shows on next AURA page visit.
- Python swarm and Node.js gateway are currently disconnected — filesystem only. Don't assume real-time communication.
- `inject_global_memory()` was broken for the entire project lifecycle until 2026-04-06. If seeing this message, the fix is working.

## Active Pre-Launch Blockers (19 total — see Constitution Part 3)
Critical path: Energy picker, Pre-Assessment Commitment Layer, DIF audit, SADPP registration, Soniox DPA, Vulnerability Window content, Landing sample AURA profile.

## Architecture Invariants
- Supabase SDK only, no ORM. Per-request client via Depends().
- pgvector(768) — Gemini embeddings, NOT 1536/OpenAI.
- PAYMENT_ENABLED=False — paywall disabled for beta. First 100 volunteers free.
- Route ordering in aura.py: static routes BEFORE parameterized (P0 bug fixed Sprint 42).
- AURA weights are FINAL — DO NOT CHANGE. communication 0.20, reliability 0.15, english_proficiency 0.15, leadership 0.15, event_performance 0.10, tech_literacy 0.10, adaptability 0.10, empathy_safeguarding 0.05.
